query: Which PJM price hub had the highest day-ahead average price in January 2024 based on your PJM database?
final_answer: **DOMINION HUB** had the highest **day-ahead average price** among PJM hubs in **January 2024**, at **$51.04/MWh** (average of `total_lmp_da`).

steps.content:
{
  "success": true,
  "data": {
    "database": "pjm_db",
    "table": "day_ahead_hourly",
    "description": "This table contains day ahead hourly prices for PJM. The columns include the following: id - contains ids for each data point, timestamp_utc - contains UTC timestamp for the price, timestamp - contains local timestamp i.e. ET for the price data, pnode_id - contians PJM specified IDs for each of the nodes, hubs and zones contained in the data, pnode_name - contains the actual name of the node, load zone or hub associated with each of the price data points, voltage - contains the voltage levels for the system nodes, equipment - contains a description of the equipment at each pricinng node, type - contains the type of the node which can be zone, load, gen, aggregate, hub, ehv, interface or ext for external, zone - contains the name of the lod zone associated with each data point, note that this could be duplicative since pnode_name column already contains the zone names too, system_energy_price_da - contains the system-wide day-ahed energy price in $/MWh, total_lmp_da - contains the actual lmps for each location in $/MWh, congestion_price_da - contains the day-ahead congestion lmps in $/MWh, marginal_loss_price_da - contains the day-ahead loss lmp in $/MWh, timezone - contains the local timezoene for PJM which is EST, source_file - contains the local source file containing the price data",

tool_input.query:
SELECT pnode_name, AVG(total_lmp_da) AS avg_da_lmp_jan2024
FROM day_ahead_hourly
WHERE type = 'HUB'
  AND timestamp_utc >= '2024-01-01'::timestamptz
  AND timestamp_utc <  '2024-02-01'::timestamptz
  AND total_lmp_da IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY pnode_name
ORDER BY avg_da_lmp_jan2024 DESC
LIMIT 1;

steps.content:
{
  "success": true,
  "data": {
    "database": "pjm_db",
    "query": "SELECT pnode_name, AVG(total_lmp_da) AS avg_da_lmp_jan2024\nFROM day_ahead_hourly\nWHERE type = 'HUB'\n  AND timestamp_utc >= '2024-01-01'::timestamptz\n  AND timestamp_utc <  '2024-02-01'::timestamptz\n  AND total_lmp_da IS NOT NULL\nGROUP BY pnode_name\nORDER BY avg_da_lmp_jan2024 DESC\nLIMIT 1",
    "execution_plan": [
      "Limit  (cost=10110.72..10110.72 rows=1 width=16)",
      "  ->  Sort  (cost=10110.72..10117.04 rows=2528 width=16)",
      "        Sort Key: (avg(total_lmp_da)) DESC",
      "        ->  HashAggregate  (cost=10066.48..10098.08 rows=2528 width=16)",
      "              Group Key: pnode_name",
      "              ->  Index Scan using ix_day_ahead_hourly_type_time on day_ahead_hourly  (cost=0.57..10050.09 rows=3278 width=16)",
      "                    Index Cond: (((type)::text = 'HUB'::text) AND (timestamp_utc >= '2024-01-01 00:00:00+00'::timestamp with time zone) AND (timestamp_utc < '2024-02-01 00:00:00+00'::timestamp with time zone))",
      "                    Filter: (total_lmp_da IS NOT NULL)"
    ],
    "has_seq_scan": false,
    "warning": null
  },
  "error": null,
  "metadata": {}
}

tool_input.query:
SELECT pnode_name, AVG(total_lmp_da) AS avg_da_lmp_jan2024
FROM day_ahead_hourly
WHERE type = 'HUB'
  AND timestamp_utc >= '2024-01-01'::timestamptz
  AND timestamp_utc <  '2024-02-01'::timestamptz
  AND total_lmp_da IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY pnode_name
ORDER BY avg_da_lmp_jan2024 DESC
LIMIT 1;

steps.content: **DOMINION HUB** had the highest **day-ahead average price** among PJM hubs in **January 2024**, at **$51.04/MWh** (average of `total_lmp_da`).
